summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Founder Copilot with focus on Thinkly Labs style UI redesign. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI elements and core functionality working well with minor mobile responsiveness issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Sidebar doesn't collapse by default on mobile viewport (390px width)
ui_bugs.details: Sidebar shows 'open' class even on mobile, should be 'closed' by default

ui_bugs.issue: Menu toggle button not clickable due to sidebar overlay interception
ui_bugs.details: Click events are intercepted by sidebar overlay, preventing menu toggle functionality

passed_tests: Landing page loads with teal gradient hero section
Floating pill navbar with 'Sign in' and 'Get Started' buttons working
Hero section displays correct title 'Turn startup goals into execution plans.'
Two CTA buttons present: 'Try Copilot Free' and 'Book a demo'
Testimonials section displays 2 testimonial cards correctly
Features section shows 'Our Solutions' title with 4 feature cards
Sign in button opens login modal with email and password fields
Login modal includes 'Continue with Google' authentication button
Try Copilot Free button successfully navigates to dashboard
Dashboard sidebar contains Dashboard, History, and Settings navigation links
Dashboard displays 'AI Founder Copilot' title correctly
All 4 workflow buttons displayed and functional (Validate idea, Growth strategy, Weekly plan, Sales funnel)
Plan generation works with bento grid displaying 6 output cards (Strategy, Actions, Risks, Execution Plan, Insight, Confidence)
Guardrail functionality blocks inappropriate requests ('Tell me a joke') with 'Out of scope' message
Smart action buttons present and working (Regenerate, Make aggressive, Reduce budget)
Loading state with skeleton cards displays correctly during plan generation
Mobile header becomes visible on mobile viewport
Backend health check endpoint working (100% success rate)
Backend guardrail endpoints working correctly
Backend plan generation with all modifiers functional
Backend status endpoints (POST/GET) working perfectly
Response structure validation - all required JSON fields present
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile responsiveness issues: 1) Sidebar should collapse by default on mobile viewports (width < 768px), 2) Menu toggle button should be clickable without sidebar overlay interference. The CSS media queries for mobile sidebar behavior need adjustment.

success_percentage.backend: 100% (10/10 tests passed - all endpoints working perfectly)
